Monthly PCR at 3.71 indicates extreme hedging pressure. 0DTE reverse_smirk divergence vs WEEKLY/MONTHLY smirk suggests short-term speculative optimism against structural bearish positioning. Max Pain at 653 provides upside magnet if 640 breaks.
